home.heroTitle: Learn astrology in a clear and structured way.
home.p1: Astrology is, above all, a way of looking at the world and at oneself. Since the dawn of time, human beings have observed the sky to find landmarks, rhythms and cycles that echo their own experience of life.
home.p2: Through a symbolic language — signs, planets and houses — astrology offers a reading of human dynamics: our drives, our doubts, our needs, our relationships and our periods of transformation. It does not claim to explain everything, nor to decide in our place, but offers keys to better grasp what is at play within us.
home.p3: Approached with method and discernment, astrology becomes a formidable tool for self-knowledge. It invites us to step back, to put words to complex experiences, and to accept what we go through, without ever denying the freedom of the individual.
home.quote: “Here, astrology is presented as knowledge to be explored patiently, in a human, respectful and structured approach, where understanding matters more than believing.”

sign.definitionText: The sign of {name} is the {ordinal} sign of the zodiac ({period}). With {polarity} polarity, it belongs to the {element} element in {mode} mode, ruled by . Its natural house is House {houseNum}.
sign.appIntro: Do you have the Sun in {name}, a {name} Ascendant or several planets in this sign? Understanding {name} in depth is far more than a horoscope: temperament, strengths, shadows, compatibilities, planets, houses and mythology. This encyclopedic guide to the astrological sign of {name} gives you all the keys for a complete reading of your birth chart.

planet.appIntro: {name} in astrology is much more than a mere celestial body in your natal chart. What is its essential function? How do you interpret it in each sign and each house? This encyclopedic guide to {name} gives you the keys to understanding its symbolism, its major aspects and its concrete influence in your life.

author.bioHtml: Passionate about astrology for over 40 years and trained for 3 years under Jean-Marie Michiels, I teach a modernised traditional astrology — faithful to the sources, illuminated by psychology. My Jupiterian approach: understand to grow, teach to share, explore to elevate.
